substep.title: Compose the Document Body
substep.action:
Synthesize the raw child findings ONCE into the methodology's section structure (from investigation-methodologies). This is the only synthesis pass — children returned raw findings; the document is where they become coherent.
Compose the body per references/research/document-format body-skeleton: Research Question, Summary, the methodology's middle sections, Open Questions.
Discipline for every section: - State facts, not transcripts. Do NOT paste raw child output. - Cite inline: file:line, URL, or thoughts/ alias for every claim. - Record silence as data: a negative finding ships as a cited line ("searched {scope}; no match"). - Surface contradictions explicitly where children disagreed, rather than picking a side silently. - Open Questions captures what the evidence could not answer, including any sub-questions deferred at the web-approval gate.

check.template-output:
Present the full drafted body for review before persistence. One checkpoint, not per-section — all dispatch is already done, so the document is reviewed as a whole.
[a] Revise (refine sections, dispatch follow-up children) [c] Continue to persistence [y] YOLO
